label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. First, let me list out all the given information step by step. Andrew woke up at 8am. So, his day starts at that time. The coffee shop is closed after 8pm, so any time after that isn't possible. So, the latest he could have gone is before 8pm. Now, let's look at the people who saw Andrew doing various activities: 1. Elizabeth saw him fixing the computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. So, during that time, he was at the electronic store. That means he couldn't be at the coffee shop during those hours (11am-3pm). 2. Jennifer saw Andrew at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. So, he was buying a bike then. That blocks off the 3-4pm slot. 3. Anthony saw him at the bakery from 4pm to 6pm. So, he was buying cookies during that time. That means 4pm-6pm is out. 4. Betty saw him watching a movie from 6pm to 8pm. So, he was at the theater during that period. Thus, 6pm-8pm is not possible. So, the only time not accounted for is between when he woke up at 8am and when Elizabeth saw him at the electronic store at 11am. So, from 8am to 11am, there's no mention of Andrew being anywhere else. Therefore, the possible time he could have gone to the coffee shop is between 8am and 11am. Let me check the options again. Looking at the options: A) 3pm to 4pm – but he was at the bike shop then. So no. B) 6pm to 8pm – he was at the movie theater. Also, the coffee shop is closed after 8pm. So, even if he went at 8pm, it's closed. So this time is not possible.
